# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security


stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  CI_REGISTRY: $CI_REGISTRY
  CI_REGISTRY_USER: $CI_REGISTRY_USER
  CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD: $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
  - ssh-keyscan $SSH_HOST >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/known_hosts

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "build.sh" ]; then
        chmod +x ./build.sh
        ./build.sh
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        make
      else
        echo "No build script or Makefile found"
        exit 1
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - tags
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "test.sh" ]; then
        chmod +x ./test.sh
        ./test.sh
      else
        echo "No test script found"
        exit 1
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - tags

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "deploy.sh" ]; then
        chmod +x ./deploy.sh
        ./deploy.sh
      else
        echo "No deploy script found"
        exit 1
      fi
  only:
    - main
  except:
    - tags

security:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "security-check.sh" ]; then
        chmod +x ./security-check.sh
        ./security-check.sh
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - tags

cache:
  key: "$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"
  paths:
    - .cache/

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"

    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "trigger"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "api"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "external_pull_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
